docs.title: Welcome to Pluggedspace Documentation
docs.text: Pluggedspace is a unified platform offering smart tools and solutions designed for every one. This documentation provides everything you need to get started with our ecosystem, use our Tools, and integrate our services into your workflows.

docs.title: 🔍 Overview
docs.text:
Pluggedspace powers a suite of intelligent, scalable tools, including:

  • Atlas — Intelligent Business Suite.
  • Agents(Weave) – Agentic Operating System

Explore how each product works, how to integrate with them, and best practices for deploying them in your organization.

docs.title: 🚀 Getting Started
docs.text:
New to Pluggedspace? Start here:

  • Platform Architecture
  • Authentication & API Keys
  • Using the Portal

docs.title: 📦 Product Documentation
docs.text:
• Atlas – Intelligence Suite
  • Agents – Agentic Operating System

docs.title: 📘 Resources
docs.text:
• FAQs
  • Glossary
  • Support & Contact

For additional help or questions, visit pluggedspace.org or contact us at support@pluggedspace.org.

Build smart. Build unified. Build with Pluggedspace.

docs.title: 🛠️ Support & Contact
docs.text: Need help with Pluggedspace products or integrations? We’re here for you. Whether you're an end user, a developer, or an agency partner, this page will guide you to the right support channels.

docs.title: 📬 Contact Us
docs.text:
You can reach out to our support team through the following channels:

  • Email: support@pluggedspace.org
  • Live Chat: Available via the Pluggedspace Portal during business hours (Mon–Fri, 9am–6pm WAT)
  • Twitter/X: @pluggedspace
  • GitHub Issues: For technical bugs or documentation issues, use our GitHub issues page

docs.title: 🔧 Troubleshooting Guide
docs.text:
Before contacting support, you might want to:

  1. Check the relevant product documentation.
  2. Visit our FAQs.
  3. Review your API key, tenant configuration, or usage logs from the portal.

docs.title: 🧠 Community & Feedback
docs.text:
We're constantly improving. Help us by sharing your experience:

  • Feature suggestions: Submit Feedback
  • Join our Discord (coming soon!)
  • Report bugs on GitHub

docs.title: 📄 Service-Level Commitments
docs.text:
We aim to respond to all inquiries within:

  • General inquiries: 24–48 business hours
  • API downtime / service outage: Within 2 hours
  • Billing issues: Within 1 business day

Your success is our priority — we’re committed to helping you build and scale with confidence.

If you’re an enterprise client or partner with dedicated support, please contact your account manager directly or use your priority support channel.

docs.title: PSAgents - Multi-Tenant Agentic OS
docs.text: PSAgents is a Multi-Tenant Agentic Operating System designed to deploy, orchestrate, and govern autonomous AI agents for businesses. It provides a centralized platform where organizations can operate specialized agents across customer service, marketing, finance, compliance, risk management, and industrial operations while maintaining strict tenant isolation and governance controls.

docs.title: 🏗️ High-Level Architecture
docs.text: The platform is built on Django, Django REST Framework, PostgreSQL, and Celery, with a unified orchestration layer and a telemetry-driven memory substrate called BrainBox.

docs.title: Core Components
docs.text:
• Agent Orchestration ("core"): Central Intent Manager responsible for agent routing, execution modes, workflow coordination, and audit logging.
  • BrainBox Memory Substrate ("brainbox"): Unified telemetry, memory, knowledge graph, and inference infrastructure.
  • Tenant & Identity Management ("accounts"): Multi-tenant isolation, user management, permissions, API access, and billing controls.
  • Vertical Agents ("agents"): Independent domain-specific agents that can operate autonomously or collaboratively.
  • Infrastructure Layer: Celery workers, Redis queues, PostgreSQL databases, vector search, and external intelligence providers.

docs.title: 1. Agent Orchestration Engine
docs.text: The Intent Manager serves as the operational core of the platform.

docs.title: Capabilities
docs.text:
• Intent classification and routing
  • Manual, Hybrid, and Autonomous execution modes
  • Workflow coordination between agents
  • Execution monitoring and latency tracking
  • Human approval checkpoints
  • Notification and escalation workflows
  • Complete audit trail generation

docs.title: Operational Modes
docs.text: Mode Description Manual Human initiates and approves every action Hybrid Agent recommends actions while humans approve critical decisions Autonomous Agent executes approved workflows independently

docs.title: 2. BrainBox Intelligence & Memory Infrastructure
docs.text: BrainBox acts as the cognitive layer powering all agents.

docs.title: Event Store
docs.text:
Captures operational telemetry including:

  • Execution status
  • Task duration
  • Agent outcomes
  • Audit records
  • Workflow history
  • User interactions

docs.title: Semantic Memory
docs.text:
Provides retrieval-augmented intelligence through:

  • Vector embeddings
  • Context retrieval
  • Knowledge persistence
  • Long-term memory management
  • Document understanding

docs.title: Knowledge Graph
docs.text:
Maintains entity relationships across organizational data.

Examples: - Vendors ↔ Contracts - Assets ↔ Maintenance Records - Customers ↔ Support Cases - Invoices ↔ Payments - Risks ↔ Mitigation Plans

docs.title: Inference Layer
docs.text:
Stores and serves:

  • Cached reasoning outputs
  • Risk scores
  • Predictions
  • Recommendations
  • Agent-generated insights

docs.title: 3. Customer Service Agent (Monica)
docs.text: Monica is a plug-and-play AI customer service platform.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Website chatbot widget
  • FAQ automation
  • Customer support workflows
  • Ticket routing
  • Complaint handling
  • Dispute management
  • Conversation memory
  • Escalation to human agents

docs.title: Integration
docs.text: Organizations can deploy Monica with a single JavaScript snippet and connect it to their knowledge base.

docs.title: 4. Marketing Intelligence Agent
docs.text: The Marketing Agent automates demand generation and market visibility.

docs.title: Capabilities
docs.text:
• SEO analysis
  • Keyword intelligence
  • Content recommendations
  • Lead generation
  • CRM synchronization
  • Market trend monitoring
  • Competitor analysis
  • Campaign performance tracking

docs.title: 5. Business Discovery Agent
docs.text: The Business Finder Agent continuously scans digital channels to identify opportunities.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Intent discovery
  • Competitor intelligence
  • Market research
  • Lead enrichment
  • Opportunity scoring
  • Industry monitoring
  • Business profiling

docs.title: 6. Governance & Compliance Agent
docs.text: The Governance Agent automates operational governance and compliance monitoring.

docs.title: Functions
docs.text:
• Vendor verification
  • Contract validation
  • Regulatory monitoring
  • Compliance assessments
  • Procurement audits
  • Invoice verification
  • Policy enforcement
  • Risk reporting

docs.title: Compliance Use Cases
docs.text:
• ISO 27001 readiness
  • ISO 9001 readiness
  • Vendor due diligence
  • Internal control assessments
  • Audit evidence collection

docs.title: 7. Finance Intelligence Agent
docs.text: Provides financial visibility and forecasting capabilities.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Cashflow analysis
  • Runway forecasting
  • Budget monitoring
  • Financial summaries
  • Scenario planning
  • Revenue trend analysis
  • Cost optimization recommendations

docs.title: 8. Maintenance & Asset Intelligence Agent
docs.text: Designed for industrial and infrastructure environments.

docs.title: Capabilities
docs.text:
• Asset monitoring
  • Telemetry ingestion
  • Predictive maintenance
  • Failure prediction
  • Work order generation
  • Maintenance scheduling
  • Equipment performance analysis

docs.title: 9. Risk Detection Agent
docs.text: Continuously evaluates operational and system risks.

docs.title: Functions
docs.text:
• Threat detection
  • Event correlation
  • Operational risk scoring
  • Incident tracking
  • Mitigation recommendations
  • Dynamic tenant risk profiling
  • Security event monitoring

docs.title: 10. Multi-Tenancy & Governance
docs.text: PSAgents is designed for enterprise-grade tenant isolation.

docs.title: Tenant Controls
docs.text:
• Dedicated tenant workspaces
  • Data isolation
  • Role-based access control (RBAC)
  • API key management
  • Usage monitoring
  • Subscription management
  • Audit visibility

docs.title: Governance Features
docs.text:
• Immutable audit logs
  • Workflow traceability
  • Activity monitoring
  • Compliance reporting
  • Data retention policies

docs.title: 11. AI & Intelligence Layer
docs.text: The platform integrates multiple intelligence providers.

docs.title: Supported Services
docs.text:
• Atlas Intelligence Layer
  • Groq (Llama Models)
  • DeepL Translation
  • ElevenLabs Voice AI

docs.title: AI Functions
docs.text:
• Natural language understanding
  • Agent reasoning
  • Semantic retrieval
  • Predictive analysis
  • Workflow automation
  • Content generation

docs.title: 12. Infrastructure & Scalability
docs.text: Built for production-grade deployments.

docs.title: Technology Stack
docs.text:
Backend - Django - Django REST Framework - Celery - Redis - PostgreSQL - pgvector

Frontend - Next.js 15 - Tailwind CSS - Zustand - Lucide Icons

Infrastructure - Docker - Docker Compose - Caddy Reverse Proxy

docs.title: Scalability Features
docs.text:
• Distributed task processing
  • Queue-based execution
  • Horizontal worker scaling
  • Vector search support
  • High-volume telemetry storage
  • Multi-agent orchestration

docs.title: Customer Operations
docs.text: Deploy AI-powered customer support and self-service workflows.

docs.title: Marketing & Sales
docs.text: Automate lead discovery, SEO optimization, and prospect intelligence.

docs.title: Governance & Compliance
docs.text: Monitor controls, audit vendors, and maintain regulatory readiness.

docs.title: Financial Operations
docs.text: Track runway, forecast cashflow, and optimize spending decisions.

docs.title: Industrial Operations
docs.text: Monitor assets and automate predictive maintenance workflows.

docs.title: Risk Management
docs.text: Detect operational threats and continuously assess business risk.

docs.title: 🔐 Security & Compliance
docs.text: PSAgents is designed around governance-first principles.

docs.title: Security Controls
docs.text:
• Tenant isolation
  • Role-based access control
  • API authentication
  • Audit logging
  • Data encryption
  • Event monitoring

docs.title: Compliance Support
docs.text:
• ISO 27001
  • ISO 9001
  • Vendor Governance
  • Internal Audit Programs
  • Risk Management Frameworks

docs.title: 📈 Vision
docs.text: PSAgents serves as the operational intelligence layer for modern organizations, enabling businesses to deploy autonomous agents that can reason, execute, learn, and collaborate while maintaining enterprise-grade governance, security, and compliance standards.

docs.title: Usage
docs.text: Usage

docs.title: Akili’s Weave (Space): Enterprise Intelligence Platform
docs.text: Akili’s Weave is an Enterprise Intelligence Platform engineered to transform raw data into production-ready insights. It serves as a centralized hub for high-quality data assets and pre-trained AI models, optimized for African data contexts.

docs.title: 🏗️ High-Level Architecture
docs.text: The system is built on Django for management and DuckDB for high-performance analytical queries. It supports multi-provider cloud storage and features a robust multi-tenancy model.

docs.title: Core Components
docs.text:
• Dataset Management (core): Handles dataset metadata, versioning, and lifecycle.
  • SQL Engine (duck): Integrates DuckDB for fast, local-first SQL execution.
  • Ingestion Engine (ingestion): Automates schema inference and data loading.
  • Intelligence Infrastructure (predictor): Manages centrally provisioned models, performance logging, and inference.
  • Tenancy & Billing (passapp): Manages tenants, roles, and usage quotas.
  • Compliance (drac): Automated data quality and compliance checks.
  • Distributed Tasks: Powered by Celery and Redis for asynchronous processing.

docs.title: 1. Dataset Lifecycle
docs.text:
• Ingestion: Supports CSV, Parquet, and Excel. Automatically infers schema.
  • Layering: Datasets move through raw, processed, refined, feature_store, and trained layers.
  • Versioning: Every update creates a new version with an audit trail of changes.
  • Lineage: Tracks dependencies between datasets and transformations.

docs.title: 2. Intelligent Querying
docs.text:
• DuckDB Integration: Allows running complex SQL on files without loading them into a traditional database.
  • NLP Interface: Translates Natural Language queries into SQL or performs semantic searches across datasets.
  • Export: Data can be exported as CSV or JSON via API.

docs.title: 3. Intelligence & Model Delivery
docs.text:
• Curated Model Registry: Provides access to high-performance, centrally managed AI models.
  • Intelligence Pipelines: Automated workflows that transform refined data into actionable predictions.
  • Edge Inference: Optimized endpoints for low-latency intelligence consumption by tenants.

docs.title: 4. Tenancy & Resource Management
docs.text:
• Multi-tenancy: Isolated data and resources per tenant.
  • Usage Quotas: Tracks compute minutes, tokens, and storage bytes.
  • Billing: Generates records based on usage logs and subscription plans.

docs.title: 5. Data Compliance (DRAC)
docs.text:
• Pre-ingestion Checks: Files are scanned for compliance before ingestion.
  • Audit Logging: Every action is recorded for security and compliance monitoring.

docs.title: Akili’s Weave (Space): Usage Guide
docs.text: This guide outlines user responsibilities and workflows based on their role in the system.

docs.title: 🛡️ Role: Admin
docs.text: Admins manage the operational aspects of the platform for a tenant. - Metadata Management: Create and manage Worlds/Domains for data organization. - Pipelines: Monitor and trigger data processing pipelines. View run history and logs. - System Health: Monitor ingestion jobs and notification feeds. - Compliance: Review audit logs and compliance check results.

docs.title: 🏢 Role: Tenant User
docs.text: Tenant Users are categorized based on their technical needs.

docs.title: 🔭 Viewer
docs.text:
• Data Discovery: Browse public and tenant-specific datasets.
  • Metadata Review: View dataset schemas, tags, and descriptions.
  • Notifications: Receive alerts about dataset updates.

docs.title: 📊 Analyst
docs.text: Includes all Viewer capabilities, plus: - Querying: Run SQL queries on datasets via the DuckDB engine. - NLP Search: Use natural language to find and filter data. - Exporting: Download filtered datasets or query results as CSV/JSON.

docs.title: 🧪 Intelligence Analyst (formerly Data Scientist)
docs.text: Includes all Analyst capabilities, plus: - Inference Optimization: Utilize pre-trained enterprise models for predictive tasks. - Performance Monitoring: Review accuracy and reliability metrics of available models. - Custom Inference: Configure inference parameters for specific business use cases. - Intelligence Pipelines: Integrate platform-delivered insights into external workflows.

docs.title: 🌎 Role Hierarchy & Permissions
docs.text:
Role Responsibility Key Capability Tenant Owner Account & Legal Authority Subscription Management, Admin Management Admin Operational Data Management Pipeline Management, Domain Setup, Ingestion Monitoring Analyst Intelligence Consumption SQL/NLP Queries, Exports, Basic Inference Viewer Data Oversight Read-only access to Metadata & Public Datasets

[!IMPORTANT] In the Enterprise Intelligence model, heavy-duty model training and refinement are managed centrally by the Platform Owner and System Admins. Tenants focus on Intelligence Orchestration via pipelines.

docs.title: Job Bot - User Guide
docs.text:
Welcome to Job Bot! Your AI-powered job search assistant available on web, Telegram, and WhatsApp.

Version: 2.1 Last Updated: December 2025

docs.title: Table of Contents
docs.text:
• Overview
  • Getting Started
  • Commands Reference
  • Features
  • Using the Bots
  • Subscription Plans
  • FAQ
  • Support

docs.title: Overview
docs.text:
Job Bot leverages AI to streamline the job search process by providing:

  • Smart Job Search: Find relevant opportunities using natural language queries
  • CV Building: Create and optimize professional resumes
  • Career Guidance: Get personalized career path recommendations
  • Application Tools: Generate cover letters and improve your CV
  • Job Alerts: Receive notifications for new matching positions
  • Interview Practice: Prepare for interviews with AI-powered mock sessions

Target Audience: Job seekers at all career levels, from entry-level to experienced professionals.

docs.title: Web Application
docs.text:
1. Visit the Job Bot website
  2. Click "Sign Up" or "Register"
  3. Fill in your details:
  4. Email address
  5. Password
  6. First and last name
  7. Organization name
  8. Click "Create Account"
  9. You're ready to start!

docs.title: Telegram Bot
docs.text:
1. Open Telegram
  2. Search for @jobautobot or visit t.me/jobautobot
  3. Click "Start" or type /start
  4. The bot will create your account automatically
  5. Start searching for jobs!

docs.title: WhatsApp Bot
docs.text:
1. Open WhatsApp
  2. Send a message to the Job Bot number
  3. Type "Hi" or "Start"
  4. The bot will create your account automatically
  5. Start searching for jobs!

docs.title: Linking Your Accounts
docs.text:
Connect your web, Telegram, and WhatsApp accounts to sync your data:

  1. Get Your Linking Code:
  2. In Telegram or WhatsApp, type /link
  3. You'll receive a 6-character code (e.g., ABC123)

  4. This code expires in 10 minutes

  5. Link on Web:

  6. Log in to the web app
  7. Go to "Link Accounts" page
  8. Enter your 6-character code

  9. Click "Link Account"

  10. Benefits:

  11. Unified job alerts across all platforms
  12. Shared subscription and search quota
  13. Access your CV and saved jobs anywhere
  14. Seamless experience across devices

docs.title: /findjobs [keywords] [location] [type]
docs.text:
Searches for jobs across multiple platforms.

Parameters: - keywords (required): Job title, skills, or company names - location (optional): City, country, or "remote" - type (optional): full-time, part-time, contract, internship

Examples:

/findjobs python developer
/findjobs data scientist london
/findjobs frontend developer remote full-time
/findjobs marketing manager new york

Web Alternative: Use the "Job Search" page with the search form.

docs.title: /quota
docs.text:
Shows your remaining job searches for the current month.

  • Free Users: 10 searches per month
  • Premium Users: Unlimited searches

Web Alternative: Check the "Subscription" page for your quota.

docs.title: /history
docs.text:
Displays your saved jobs and search history.

Web Alternative: View saved jobs on the "Job Search" page.

docs.title: /build_cv
docs.text:
Starts an interactive CV creation wizard with the following sections: - Personal information - Work experience (multiple positions) - Education history - Skills and competencies - Projects and portfolio - Certifications and awards - References

The bot guides you through each section step by step.

Web Alternative: Use the "CV Builder" page to edit your profile.

docs.title: /view_cv
docs.text:
Displays your current CV in a formatted, readable layout.

Web Alternative: View your profile on the "CV Builder" page.

docs.title: /cv_review
docs.text:
Provides AI-powered analysis of your CV with suggestions for: - Formatting improvements - Content optimization - Keyword enhancement for ATS systems - Section organization

Premium Feature - Available on web "CV Builder" page.

docs.title: /setalert
docs.text:
Creates personalized job alerts based on your criteria: - Job titles and keywords - Locations (or remote) - Salary ranges - Experience levels - Company types

Examples of alert criteria: - "Senior software engineer positions in Berlin" - "Remote marketing jobs paying $80k+" - "Entry-level data analyst roles"

Web Alternative: Use the "Job Alerts" page to create and manage alerts.

docs.title: /myalerts
docs.text:
Manages your active job alerts: - View all active alerts - Edit alert criteria - Delete alerts - Pause/resume alerts

Web Alternative: Manage alerts on the "Job Alerts" page.

docs.title: /careerpath [current_role]
docs.text:
Explores career progression options and potential growth paths.

Examples:

/careerpath software developer
/careerpath marketing coordinator
/careerpath data analyst

Provides: - Next-level positions (broader roles) - Specialized positions (narrower roles) - Alternative career paths (related roles) - Required skills and experience

Web Alternative: Use the "Career Path" page.

docs.title: /practice
docs.text:
Interactive interview preparation with: - Common behavioral questions - Technical questions by field - STAR method guidance - Sample answers and feedback

Premium Feature - Available on web "Interview Practice" page.

docs.title: /upskill
docs.text:
Generates personalized learning recommendations: - Skill gaps analysis - Online course suggestions with links - Reading materials - Project ideas - Certification paths

Web Alternative: Use the "Upskill Plan" page.

docs.title: /coverletter Job Title | Company
docs.text:
Generates tailored cover letters based on: - Specific job title and company - Your CV information - Industry standards and best practices - Company research and culture fit

Format: /coverletter [Job Title] | [Company Name]

Examples:

/coverletter Software Engineer | Google
/coverletter Marketing Manager | Apple
/coverletter Data Scientist | Remote Company

Features: - Customized to job requirements - Highlights relevant experience - Professional tone and structure - Editable template output

Premium Feature - Available on web "CV Builder" page.

docs.title: /subscribe
docs.text:
Shows premium plan options and upgrade process.

Premium Benefits: - Unlimited job searches (vs. 10/month free) - Up to 5 active job alerts (vs. 1 free) - AI CV review - Cover letter generator - Mock interview practice - Priority support - Full search results access - Enhanced career insights

Web Alternative: Visit the "Subscription" page to upgrade.

docs.title: /start
docs.text: Initializes the bot and displays welcome message with overview.

docs.title: /help
docs.text: Lists all available commands with brief descriptions.

docs.title: /link
docs.text: Generates a linking code to connect your bot account to the web app.

docs.title: /unlink
docs.text: Disconnects your bot account from the web app.

docs.title: Smart Job Search
docs.text:
• Natural Language Processing: Understands complex queries like "senior python jobs in tech startups"
  • Multi-platform Aggregation: Searches across major job boards (LinkedIn, Indeed, Glassdoor, etc.)
  • Advanced Filtering: Location, salary, experience level, company size, and more
  • Relevance Scoring: AI-powered matching based on your profile and preferences

docs.title: Professional CV Builder
docs.text:
• Guided Creation: Step-by-step process for each CV section
  • Industry Templates: Field-specific formats (tech, marketing, healthcare, etc.)
  • ATS Optimization: Ensures compatibility with applicant tracking systems
  • Export Options: Multiple format support
  • AI Review: Get feedback on your CV (Premium)

docs.title: Intelligent Job Alerts
docs.text:
• Automated Monitoring: Daily checks for new matching positions
  • Instant Notifications: Receive alerts via Telegram, WhatsApp, or email
  • Customizable Criteria: Set specific requirements for your ideal job
  • Multiple Alerts: Create up to 5 alerts (Premium) or 1 (Free)

docs.title: Career Development Tools
docs.text:
• Career Path Explorer: Discover progression opportunities and related roles
  • Upskill Plans: Get personalized learning roadmaps
  • Mock Interviews: Practice with AI-powered interview sessions (Premium)
  • Cover Letter Generator: Create tailored cover letters (Premium)

docs.title: Career Analytics
docs.text:
• Search Tracking: Monitors your job search activity and patterns
  • Skill Gap Analysis: Identifies areas for professional development
  • Market Insights: Provides industry trends and salary data

docs.title: Telegram Bot
docs.text:
Starting the Bot: 1. Search for @jobautobot in Telegram or visit t.me/jobautobot 2. Click "Start" or type /start

Available Commands: - /start - Initialize the bot - /findjobs <query> - Search for jobs - /setalert - Create job alerts - /myalerts - Manage job alerts - /history - View saved jobs - /build_cv - Create your CV - /view_cv - View your CV - /cv_review - Get CV feedback (Premium) - /coverletter <title> | <company> - Generate cover letter (Premium) - /careerpath <role> - Explore career paths - /upskill - Get learning recommendations - /practice - Mock interview practice (Premium) - /quota - Check remaining searches - /link - Generate linking code - /unlink - Disconnect from web account - /subscribe - Manage subscription - /help - Get help

Tips: - You can search by typing /findjobs followed by your query - Save jobs directly from search results - Get notified about new jobs matching your alerts

docs.title: WhatsApp Bot
docs.text:
Starting the Bot: 1. Save the Job Bot number to your contacts 2. Send "Hi" or "Start" to begin

Available Commands: Same as Telegram - just type the command (e.g., /findjobs python developer)

Tips: - WhatsApp bot works exactly like Telegram - All your data syncs across platforms - You can switch between platforms anytime

docs.title: Bot Best Practices
docs.text:
1. Be Specific: Use detailed search queries for better results
  2. ❌ /findjobs developer

  3. ✅ /findjobs senior python developer remote

  4. Use Alerts: Set up alerts for ongoing job searches

  5. Save time by getting notified automatically

  6. Focus on jobs that match your criteria

  7. Link Accounts: Connect your web and bot accounts

  8. Access premium features on all platforms
  9. Keep your data synchronized

docs.title: Free Plan
docs.text:
Included: - ✅ 10 job searches per month - ✅ 1 job alert - ✅ Save unlimited jobs - ✅ Basic CV building - ✅ Career path explorer - ✅ Upskill learning plans - ✅ Access via web, Telegram, and WhatsApp

Limitations: - ❌ Limited searches (10/month) - ❌ Only 1 alert - ❌ No CV review - ❌ No cover letter generator - ❌ No mock interviews

docs.title: Premium Plan
docs.text:
Price: NGN 4,500/month (approximately $9.99 USD)

Everything in Free, Plus: - ✅ Unlimited job searches - ✅ Up to 5 job alerts - ✅ AI CV review - ✅ Cover letter generator - ✅ Mock interview practice - ✅ Priority support - ✅ Full search results access - ✅ Enhanced career insights - ✅ Early access to new features

docs.title: How to Subscribe
docs.text:
1. Via Web:
  2. Go to "Subscription" page
  3. Click "Upgrade to Premium"
  4. Complete payment via Paystack

  5. Verify payment

  6. Via Bot:

  7. Type /subscribe
  8. Follow the payment instructions
  9. Your account will be upgraded automatically

docs.title: Payment Methods
docs.text:
• Paystack: Credit/Debit cards, Bank transfer
  • Secure: All payments are processed securely
  • Cancel Anytime: No long-term commitment

docs.title: General Questions
docs.text:
Q: Is Job Bot free? A: Yes! We offer a free plan with 10 searches per month. Premium plans unlock unlimited searches and advanced features.

Q: Which platforms does Job Bot support? A: Job Bot is available on web, Telegram, and WhatsApp. You can use any or all platforms.

Q: Can I use Job Bot on multiple devices? A: Yes! Link your accounts to access your data across all platforms and devices.

Q: Which job boards do you search? A: We aggregate from multiple sources including LinkedIn, Indeed, Glassdoor, major job boards, company career pages, and specialized platforms.

docs.title: Account & Linking
docs.text:
Q: How do I link my Telegram/WhatsApp to my web account? A: Type /link in the bot to get a 6-character code. Enter this code on the web app's "Link Accounts" page.

Q: What happens when I link my accounts? A: Your job alerts, saved jobs, subscription status, and search quota are shared across all platforms.

Q: Can I unlink my accounts? A: Yes, use the "Unlink" button on the web app or type /unlink in the bot.

Q: Is my data secure? A: Yes, we take data privacy seriously. Your personal information and CV data are encrypted and stored securely.

docs.title: Job Search
docs.text:
Q: How accurate are the job matches? A: Job Bot uses advanced AI algorithms to match your profile with relevant positions, considering skills, experience, preferences, and career goals.

Q: Can I apply directly through Job Bot? A: We provide direct links to job applications. Click "Apply Now" to go to the employer's application page.

Q: How do I save a job? A: Click the "Save" button on web or use the save option in bot search results.

docs.title: Alerts
docs.text:
Q: How often do I get alert notifications? A: Alerts check for new positions daily and notify you immediately when matches are found.

Q: Can I pause an alert? A: Yes! Use the "Pause" button on web or manage alerts via /myalerts in the bot.

Q: How many alerts can I create? A: Free plan: 1 alert. Premium plan: Up to 5 alerts.

docs.title: CV & Applications
docs.text:
Q: Can I export my CV? A: Yes, the CV builder allows export in multiple formats suitable for different applications.

Q: How does the CV review work? A: Our AI analyzes your CV and provides feedback on content, formatting, and optimization for job applications (Premium feature).

Q: Can I generate multiple cover letters? A: Yes! Premium users can generate unlimited cover letters for different job applications.

docs.title: Subscription
docs.text:
Q: Is there a free trial for premium? A: All users start with free access. Premium features are available through subscription with clear benefits outlined.

Q: How do I upgrade to Premium? A: Go to the "Subscription" page on web or type /subscribe in the bot.

Q: What payment methods do you accept? A: We accept credit/debit cards and bank transfers via Paystack.

Q: Can I cancel my subscription? A: Yes, you can cancel anytime. Your premium features will remain active until the end of your billing period.

Q: Do I get a refund if I cancel? A: Subscriptions are non-refundable, but you can use premium features until the end of your billing period.

docs.title: Technical Issues
docs.text:
Q: The bot isn't responding. What should I do? A: 1. Check your internet connection 2. Try typing /start to restart the bot 3. If the issue persists, contact support

Q: I didn't receive my linking code. What should I do? A: Type /link again to generate a new code. Codes expire after 10 minutes.

Q: My search quota isn't updating. Why? A: 1. Ensure your accounts are linked if using multiple platforms 2. Check your subscription status 3. Contact support if the issue persists

Q: I can't log in to the web app. What should I do? A: 1. Verify your email and password 2. Try resetting your password 3. Clear your browser cache 4. Contact support if needed

Q: Is there a mobile app? A: Job Bot runs entirely within Telegram and WhatsApp, which are available on all major mobile platforms. The web app is also mobile-responsive.

docs.title: Getting Help
docs.text:
• In-Bot Support: Use /help for command assistance
  • Email: support@pluggedspace.org
  • Documentation: docs.pluggedspace.org/models/job
  • Website: pluggedspace.org/projects/job

docs.title: Common Issues
docs.text:
• Search Limits: Use /quota to check remaining searches
  • CV Building: Use /build_cv for step-by-step guidance
  • Job Alerts: Use /myalerts to manage notifications
  • Premium Features: Use /subscribe for upgrade information

docs.title: Optimize Your Job Search
docs.text:
1. Use Specific Keywords: Include job title, skills, and location
  2. Set Up Alerts: Don't miss out on new opportunities
  3. Update Your Profile: Keep your CV current
  4. Apply Quickly: Early applications get more attention

docs.title: Make the Most of Premium
docs.text:
1. Review Your CV: Get AI feedback before applying
  2. Customize Cover Letters: Generate tailored letters for each application
  3. Practice Interviews: Build confidence with mock interviews
  4. Explore Career Paths: Plan your long-term career growth

docs.title: Stay Organized
docs.text:
1. Save Interesting Jobs: Build your job pipeline
  2. Track Applications: Keep notes on where you've applied
  3. Follow Up: Check application status regularly
  4. Network: Connect with people in your target companies

Happy Job Hunting! 🎉

We're here to help you find your dream job. Good luck!

Last updated: December 2024 Version: 2.1 For the latest updates, visit our documentation site.
